text: The glass walls create a sense of openness, yet I feel a subtle separation from what lies beyond—perhaps knowledge on display. Entering the exhibit, I am struck by the vibrant colors and bold letters: "R + D." Here, in this space dedicated to research and development, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The marriage of humanity and technology is celebrated on these walls. It sparks within me a silent contemplation: how will we coexist with our intelligent creations? I feel small, yet part of something vast and unfolding.
